title: rule_versions
description: Frozen snapshot of a rule_set. Exactly one version per rule_set has is_current=true. Historical quotes reference a specific version so they reproduce identically even after rules change. Bump the version rather than editing an existing 'current' version's rules in-place if you want to preserve old quote reproducibility.

rule_set_name.description: Name of the rule_set this version belongs to.

is_current.description: Exactly one version per rule_set must be true.

effective_from.description: ISO date when this version became effective (YYYY-MM-DD).
